channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire as peace talks stall
item.description: The U.S. military reported shooting down six Iranian drones headed toward the Strait of Hormuz, while seven ballistic missiles were also intercepted.

item.title: WATCH: Karl-Anthony Towns' emotional tribute to his late mother
item.description: After a key role in the Knicks' Game 2 Finals win, Towns reflects on his mother and the strength he draws from her memory.

item.title: The Plot to Eliminate Alyssa Burkett
item.description: A toxic couple orchestrates an elaborate plan to kill a mother. "48 Hours" correspondent Peter Van Sant reports.

item.title: After woman's murder, detectives learn killer was "only half the story"
item.description: After Alyssa Burkett was murdered in broad daylight in Carrollton, Texas, Andrew Beard, the father of her child, became a suspect. Investigators would...
